description_long: This object is a round, red rice cooker with a glossy finish and white polka dot pattern covering its exterior. The main body is cylindrical with a slightly flared rim and a deep, dark gray interior, suggesting a non-stick or metal cooking surface. Two short, black handles are attached symmetrically on opposite sides, likely made of heat-resistant plastic for safe handling. The rice cooker does not display any visible control panel, buttons, or indicator lights, giving it a simple, utilitarian appearance. There is no visible lid, power cord, or branding on the exterior. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for countertop use in kitchens or communal urban spaces.
description: A round, red rice cooker with white polka dots, black side handles, and a deep gray interior. The design is simple, glossy, and lacks visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red polka-dotted body, deep gray interior, and both black side handles visible at the edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one black handle prominently, with the other handle not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both black handles visible at the edges and the same polka-dot pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing the other black handle prominently.
attribute_lid_design: No lid is present or visible on the object.
attribute_handle_type: Two fixed, short, rectangular black handles are attached symmetrically on opposite sides of the body, likely made of plastic.
